this stuff is cool. at first i was kind of nervous in buying/using this because i had never used a self-tanner, and this one is known to last longer and not be orange. on first application, i noticed a wonderful difference in my skin tone. from winter white to a lovely golden tone. not orange.i followed the instructions, though, and i think that's the main thing. exfoliate really well and there should not be orange problems, and it should last a week or so.

works great. "jeff's wife" - i've used the white name brand for years and some store brands but not the charcoal ones. these work just as good as the others, although i'm not sure if the charcoal really makes a difference.the description photos show slits in the strip but i haven't seen them in mine, not a big deal but they do serve a purpose. there is quite a bit of black residue left over (there's also residue left over when using the white ones, the black is just more visible) but it rinses away easily with warm water.i'm very happy with these.

great stamping polishes!. "jeff's wife"- these are so good! i only wish i had the original versions to compare. i've only heard negative things about the original stamping polishes from bm so i don't own any, i've only used mdu. but when bm reformulated their stamping polishes i gave them a try and i now own all the new collections so i gave these a try too. boy am i glad i did. these did not disappoint! i don't own white stamping polish, i use sinful colors snow me white that has been open for 3 days, it works but it's still not proper stamping polish. the black i use is mdu, the absolute holy grail of stamping polishes. but i have to say that these are beyond good! this black is comparable to mdu black in every way, except the smell. these have just become my favorite! i don't think i will be ordering from anyone else anymore.

like the other sets it's difficult to get a clean .... ideas are limitless with the buffet sections on the three plates. like the other sets it's difficult to get a clean scrape on some of the corner images. but i do think it helps if you have a very flexible scraper, which i don't.

did absolutely nothing!!!. what a complete waste of money! i was pretty disappointed with this product. it absolutely did nothing for my lashes in terms of lengthening or thickening. i thought i would see some improvement but nothing changed in my lashes at all. that being said, it does seem to condition them pretty well, but not worth the money in my opinion.

i love it!. i love this! i have rosacea and the grape seed extract helps broken capillaries in your face which is great! i wash my face in the morning and apply a little bit to my face which helps my foundation go on really smooth!

great clay facial mask. i have very sensitive dry skin, so i was worried that this would over dry and irritate my skin. first of all, it smells amazing. it smells very natural, like greenery and botanicals. this mask has ever so slightly some grit to it. it isn't the scrubbiest of exfoliating masks. the clay doesn't over dry your skin. i do not feel like my skin is tight feeling after washing my face. overall, it feels very luxurious and relaxing. great weekly skin treat to unwind at home. highly recommended.

perfect for hand sanitizer. i use this to fill with rubbing alcohol to use as hand sanitizer. i clip it to my bag and use the sprayer to disinfect shopping carts as well. super handy. they sprayer works very well and does not get clogged. overall, highly recommended. have filled all of them and given them to family members to utilize as well.

very fine floss. these picks use plastic, but very little compared to other floss picks. the floss itself is also very fine, which makes it great for my tight teeth. east to carry. easy to use. wish it had no plastic, but that's why i save these for the road, and just use a water flosser at home.
really cute necklace. really liked it and it is didn't lose any stones so far.

good for the price. this came with a foil seal in a bag. it's a very sweet scented gel that feels nice on the skin - like a soft layer/barrier, but unlike other overnight masks i've tried, the effects weren't really apparent once you remove this the next morning. it's currently $12.99.

very glittery. i have a lot of orange-gold lip colors because i find them very flattering on me, so i was pretty confident i would like this. the color is beautiful and not too orange. while i like the gold too, the specks of glitter are larger and more obvious than i would like. some gold is really fine and distributes as an even shimmer across your lips. with this, you can see the glitter speck here, the glitter speck there, the glitter speck falling a little outside your lip line that will probably end up somewhere else on your face. it has more of a youthful, party feel. i agree it's a color reminiscent of sunsets, suited for summer and fall. the case is possibly the most sophisticated i own though. it has a nice weight, and the magnetic closure feels good. it came in a box and in a sealed bag. i don't mind wearing this color, but i wouldn't buy it again. i think i like the case the best, but i'm not convinced the color or feel add up to make it worth $38.

maybe better for older skin?. i've used a drugstore pressed powder for years and always gotten compliments, so it's hard to think i need to pay $52. i can't say i was especially impressed by this. however, i'm getting to the age where i'm starting to notice my makeup can look dry and accentuate lines i didn't even think i had. i'm not wearing much makeup these days, but based on reviews, i got this with the hope it will work for maturing skin. i can see this also washing you out a bit as another reviewer mentioned. it's white, and even though i'm fair, i felt this needed a very light application. the good news is if such a thin dusting can live up to the reviews, it makes the price a little better. i was surprised how low quality the puff felt. it's very thin and almost felt rough.
great price, nice product. i'm a big fan of silk powder as it is so nice for my uber sensitive skin. happy to have found this as its a great price for silk powder.
pretty bridesmaid comb. very pretty comb, using as a bridesmaid accessory. it looks delicate and lovely.
for some reason the one i received was way lighter .... for some reason the one i received was way lighter than the one i already owned.it still works but it definitely wasn't the color i expected.

cool. i love the wide selection of soaps, so many to choose from. the soaps are long lasting but can make you a little dry, which is normal for bar soaps i think. it's a great deal and a good way to sample multiple scents. the bar is a square about the size of my palm.
perfect. works perfectly as intended with no issues!

durable and smooth. wanted a nice comb as i kept losing the $3 ones from the stores. much smoother and nicer to use, and quite durable so far(i spin it on the loop so it takes quite a few falls). plus youll want to keep track of it unlike a normal comb

didn't do much for my hair. hoped product would improve my hair and it does somewhat, but seems a bit heavy on my hair. haven't done the 5 min treatment, only 2-3 minutes, when i'm showering, wash my hair, put this stuff in and then continue with my shower, which only takes a few minutes. it does help hair comb out with no tangling, but can get that with any good conditioner. i do need to address their sales/customer service actions - received email asking about the product, if i was happy with it, etc, and responded that i hadn't tried it yet, and after trying a few times would leave amazon review. in the next couple of weeks i received 3 more emails, which i found annoying. so i'll say the product was okay, sales follow up was very annoying.

awful.. i have never had something make my hair feel as awful as this does. it really feels like glue has been rubbed all through my hair. awful. the only thing this has going for it is that it smells nice. otherwise, it's really very bad.
wonderful!!!. best product i have ever used. my blackheads are visibly reduced and it makes my skin feel soft without being dry.

top quality. these bottles are not your average travel bottles that you find in the .50 cents bin at wal-mart. they are made to use. inmy opinion they are not expensive. they are high quality and made very tough. as the old saying "you get what you pay for".so, if you are looking for a 4oz bottle for travel or use in the bathroom, these are the ticket. worth every penny.they do not leak...

did not get rid of blackheads or reduced pores size. i really wanted this product to work. i have used it as directly for over a month and unfortunately it did not get rid of my blackheads or reduced the size of my pores. it does leave the skin soft and clean which is why i kept it, but the blackheads remained. so far, the only thing that has helped me keep those annoying blackheads off my nose is extraction.
good for watercolors. [[videoid:e755d7eeac7a1ab5fd83430a2e2ae613]] i got these for my watercolors which i make. they work perfet for it. good quantity and good price.

did not like them. i did not like the individual packaging they didnt really take down my swollen under eye bags and they were packaged separately and hard to get out of there a little packaging so i will not buy this againdid not like them. also split upon application which is bad for an under eyepatch

works for me!. this is a great little gadget for cleaning dust and crumbs. it has a plus, a tube for spot cleaning. the suction is not very strong but is enough to do the job. the gray is a nice neutral color and should fit most decor.
a nice balance of colors. very nice palette but some of the colors did not survive shipping. the stay on well with eye primer. i need apply only once and they last all day.
did not like smell. i thought this would smell better but after using it a few days, a bad chemical odor began to annoy me. the rose smell got cloying too. did not seem to benefit from use either.

its a cosplay wig, not for daily wear.. this wig is made fairly well. its sheds a lot and a little of the cap shows at the front of the wig. the fibers are nice and silky. i bought it for my halloween costume and its perfect for that but not for daily wear.

good brush. my daughter likes this brush oh, but it's a little smaller and not quite as good of a quality as one i had like this prior that we lost. it does a good job untangling her hair which is long and thick with fine hair shafts that break easily, and a little bit wavy but mostly straight and silky.she hates brushing her hair but does like using this one. i think the build quality could be a little better but it's acceptable and it does a good job. the bright color also helps to find it in her messy room.

happy with it!. i had never heard of this brand before and was also looking forward to trying this out because i feel like this shade wouldn't look right on me- i guess because i have a lot of redness in my face. so getting the opportunity to try it out allowed me to branch out and try a shade i would normally be hesitant to buy. i'm glad because i love it! i ended-up loving the shade and how it looks on me. it applies so smoothly and even feels moisturizing while wearing. i love the shimmer- it's enough to be noticeable and pretty but isn't too much. happy with it!

nice colors for fall. cute colors for fall. only 2 coats needed. nice, opaque gel polishes that last! all are very unique and perfect neutrals. the shade names are the color of the shade inside the bottle which is helpful, but the are not stuck on the bottle very well. nice size bottles.

good braiding hair. great ombre braiding hair. not to many snags, or tangles while braiding. it dips well and is able to hold a curl for a very long time. this was enough to do my cousin entire head. love it, will order more

meh. they ok, not the best lashes..... i like em full and long. these are church lashes (lol) but they work, they stick to your eyes momentarily they last about 2 days whereas my usual lashes last for about 4-7 days. says reusable but you will have to clean them well.

great lashes. great lashes, soft and east to put on. they look so real and make my eyes pop. i have used them several times and they do not fall off easily. very full and dramatic but natural. love them. will purchase more.

these work very well. this mask is very nice. i have never used a mask like this one before. it's heavier than the usual thin almost paper or gel like masks that a lot of them seem to be. this one definitely has a bit more to it. it's also a two piece mask which is great in some ways because sometimes i looks like a one person comedy routine trying to get the masks on right while they flip and flop all over.with this mask you put the bottom part then the top by your eyes, it makes it a lot easier. then you leave it on for at least 20 minutes ( though it says to leave it on for 30 so i did that). when you take it off you gently pat the left over into your skin.it leaves your skin feeling so soft and really well moisturized. i feel like it did a very nice job with firming up the skin as well. i have only used two of these so far, one a week over two weeks, and have really liked the way my skin looked and felt after each use. i would recommend giving these a try if you can. perhaps in summer as they have a nice cooling feel to them that i bet would feel great in the summer heat!

these work well. these underarm sweat pads are just the thing for that extra protection in times of need! sometimes no matter how much or what kind of deodorant you use, you just can't seem to stop the unsightly and ever so embarrassing pit stain of doom. with these placed in your shirt the sweat never reaches your shirt and your garments are saved!these work very well. to use them you simply lay your shirt down flat, remove the covering over the adhesive, place firmly in the spot needed, and you are good to go. when you are going to take it off remember to very gently remove it because it can become pretty sticky. it mentions this when you read about the product above but it is worth the reminder here!these work very well and are a good option if you have problems often or occasionally with sweaty underarms.

wax on, wax off, hair still there. i think a lot of us want an easier way to remove hair. shaving, especially for a bigger girl like me, is not that easy. its worse when you have long legs, short arms.its bad when you have certain chin hairs (thankfully not that much it isnt manageable another way).i tried some sugar wax kit back about 20+ years ago. that was a nightmare! it was supposedly edible. i think you microwaved the container, spread it on, let it cool, used a paper strip (supplied) to remove the hair. it didnt work and stung.i then moved to a hair removal cream, that partially worked.after that? back to the hold stand-by > shave foam/cream and a razor. for my main body parts, thats always worked. tough chin hairs > using a tweezer work. no, the dermaplaning tool didnt work on them.i got a wax warmer, so i thought all beads/beans were equal.these came with zero instructions, and the after spray bottle was busted. the warmer kit at least had some. and, my warmer kit had specially made, disposable cups.these beads/beans, in a smaller cup, took over 90 minute to melt. and, the warmer was on 180(f).i tried a small amount on my arm. the wax was sticky, not liquidy, and it cooled almost as soon as it hit my skin.i let it sit there for a few minutes (over 5), and peeled the max off. it didnt hurt, sting, or cause redness then again the hair was still thereokay, so my hair on my arm is a little thin. but, if this removes thick hair, shouldnt it remove thinner hair?i found another patch, got some warm wax tried it again. nope. tried legs, arms, and under my chin. nothing. then again, i see i'm not the only one experiencing issues with these beads/beans.i may have gotten a bad batch. but, i definitely wouldnt get these again.

not the best set out there. be warned, this is not dip powder. this is indeed acrylic powder in very small jars.this does not come with instructions though at least mine didnt. so that could make this a bit hard to work with.the colors are pretty though.this isnt the best kit out there, i have seen better ones. the packaging isnt that stable or durable. i ended up putting the jars in a pencil case.i honestly wouldnt get it again. as far as durability, i usually do my manicure every week or so.

yummy scent. although i wish this body wash was more sudsy, it smells delightful, a nice burst of sunshine in winter. it is hydrating but not enough for dry winter, its probably going to be fine on summer months. the scent really is luscious!

gentle retinol serum. this retina serum, more like a cream, is very gentle so if this isnt something you normally use due to redness or sensitivity this might be a good product for you. results will be much slower but you wont have peeling skin or dryness. this is also hydrating so itss good mix of ingredients to make it perfect for sensitive skin. it works well but im not noticing any brightness to my skin.

happily, this one did not. i have difficulty with serums as they tend to cause breakouts. happily, this one did not. maybe because there is almond oil in it, my skin does very well with that. i haven't noticed a reduction in wrinkles but this is gentle enough to use around my eyes. this makes my skin smoother for applying makeup in the morning and the serum isn't greasy at all.i really like that this isn't tested on animals and i think the price is decent. time will tell if this makes me look younger.

stayed sticky for 15 minutes. the multivitamin sleeping mask by vitamasques is made in korea. the tube has a foil safety seal under the cap.i liked the concept of a face mask i could wear to bed. im not as good as i should be at keeping to a proper skincare routine. so i thought this sleeping mask would be great. put it on before bed and wake up with a hydrated, healthier face.the directions say apply a generous layer before you sleep or whenever your skin needs a nourishing boost. i started with a small pea-sized drop, which was enough for my whole face.the mask has a gel consistency and goes on clear. but it did not absorb into my skin. after fifteen minutes, my face was still sticky and tacky. no way would i go to sleep like that, my face would stick to the pillow.so i washed the mask off, which was a disappointment since its supposed to be a non-wash off mask. my skin was a little softer, but having to wash my face because it was still sticky defeats the purpose of a mask that im supposed to be able to wear to sleep.

aloe vera gel. this aloe vera gel by sdara skincare takes a few minutes to fully absorb into my skin. i worried it would leave behind a sticky feeling, since i could feel it on my arm the whole time it took to dry. but once the gel finally absorbed, i couldnt feel any residue left behind. i didnt notice much of any scent either, which is another positive for me.the gel is clear; the plastic bottle is amber colored to help keep light out. i wish the bottle had a flip top or squeeze lid instead of a screw off cap.the list of ingredients is what gives me pause. im not sure why sodium bicarbonate (baking soda) would need to be added to the organic aloe leaf juice. the product description mentions we perfected our serum by enriching with vitamin e, & citric acid for improved nutrient absorption. i dont see vitamin e listed in the ingredients.i will probably end up using this aloe vera gel to make hand sanitizer. the gel is thick, so it should be good for that use.

beast blue cooling body wash. a friendly word of warning: dont use beast blue cooling body wash down south unless you like tingly body parts.the consistency of the body wash is a little watery, so its easy to squeeze out more than you might want. it lathers well and rinses clean without leaving behind a residue.i really like the smell of the body wash. its a strong, crisp scent that really does wake you up. my nose tingled the first time i smelled it. the scent is hard to describe. i cant pick out any individual notes, just a crisp smell that made me go wow, this smells cool and different.

cancun collection kale firm & smooth body lotion. kale leaf extract (brassica oleracea acephala) is the 14th ingredient listed out of 23 for the cancun collection kale firm & smooth body lotion. this lotion is made in canada.the lotion absorbed quickly into my skin, but did leave behind a slightly tacky feel for about 5 minutes after application.its currently the middle of winter where i am, so i was able to see just how moisturizing the lotion is for me when i already had dry skin. the lotion has a medium-weight consistency and gets the job done for about half the day.what i dont like about this lotion is the scent. the scent is subtle, sort of like vanilla coconut, and its fine at first. but the scent lingers for several hours, and after that time, ive had enough of it.
wonderful. super hydrating and goes on like silk. convenient and easy to use pump bottle. a little goes a long way.

great toner pads. i use these as a toner after i wash my face and before i apply any serums or moisturizer. they work great to help tighten my pores and pick up anything my face wash missed. usually i skip using any sort of included tweezers but these pads are a bit thinner and using the tweezers makes it much easier to get just one.

great all in one serum. this is a great all in one serum that hits all my main wants. it is a bit oily though so be careful how much you use. i tend to use this one more at night so i don't have to worry about waiting for it to fully absorb before adding moisturizer.

absorbs well. i was happy with how well this absorbed, i've tried a few other vitamin c serums and its a mixed bag. about half leave my skin sticky and don't seem to absorb. sia's however was great. soaked in and didn't feel like it was sitting on top of my skin.super easy to layer with other products.

nice middle of the road set. i was hoping there would be a price available at the time of this review, but currently it wasn't posted. bath bombs come in a range of prices and quality, without a price it's hard to say if this is a good value. kiddo loves bath bombs, but he values toys and water coloring over quality of skin softening or scent. so for this set he was not of any help. i tried one and found it to be nice but not as skin softening as some of the bigger ones i've tried. these are really more midline as the fizz is just average, scent was alright and not off putting but not amazing.if these are under $15 i'd say great value, above $20 and i'm not sure they are worth it, but not a terrible deal.
hard and break easily. not a fan of these. they have very little swab so are hard and not padded well. the stick breaks easily and then its sharp. i can't recommend.

the smell is horrible. the smell is overwhelming, the worst i've ever encountered in a hair dye. i'd suggest keeping the windows open and use a fan.it's easy to use, pretty much the same instructions as any other hair dye i've tried. for best results, it's important to do the allergy and stand tests as instructed. also follow the instructions about not massaging it into the scalp. it burns a little if that happens.it covers grey well. it lightened dark blond hair somewhat, and produced an uneven time, which is part of the point, but which seemed a little erratic for my taste.

good quality horse groomer. chose this to replace an older one my husband had that got left outside too long. this is excellent on horses and also goats, both of which we have. horses seem to like being brushed this way. actually works well on cats and dogs too, but it is a little rougher and sometimes scares them. my little cat though loved the gloves though. the groomer is well made. as good of quality as the other name brand one we had. no complaints or regrets on this set.

lovin' those tips. if you don't want to think about having to touch up your liner all day, and i mean all day, you'll love this clever eyeliner.dual tips means you have one product that gives you 100% precision.if you like to get artistic, if you like to play with your makeup, those tips are so much fun and you can create so many looks. from slim cat eye to thick cleopatra.very nice, definitely a keeper.

good horse set. this set is good because these types of tools wear out quickly. it doesn't make sense to spend a lot of money on them because you're going to have to replace them frequently.if it's a really cold night, unbelievably, a horse can get an undercoat just that quick. the gloves are important to get that undercoat in check, all year long.

before and after. i actually hadn't intended on doing a before and after photograph, but there was such a difference after i massaged this lotion into my hands, that i wanted to show you how much of a difference it made. with just one application.now i understand why this is used at hospitals. it is amazingly effective as well as being allergen-free. steroid free. fragrance free. there's a little bit of a natural aroma of the ingredients but it is not offensive. it smells like just about every other fragrance-free product the big difference is that this one is way more effective than most other products of this type that i've tried. this is one that makes me wish i had given the others lower ratings. it's that good.not high priced. no splashy logos. just an extremely effective lotion for extremely dry skin.

realistic scalp. i love the chocolate and chestnut colors of this silky wig.when you first remove it from the netting, there's a lot of static so you do need to spray it down before wearing it. it's one of the better scalps on wigs of this price range, as you can see in the photograph. not as fake looking as most.in my opinion it's a very good wig for the money.

a must for date night. love the way this balm and conditioner is fragranced. if you like oud, with it's mysteriously sensual scent of woodsy incense, this is for you.the jar looks uniquely elegant.although it's a solid balm, it melts easily in your hands. in shipping, it looks like it seperated a bit, right down to staining the presentation box.while that might be an issue if giving as a gift, it does not affect the quality or use.a little goes a long way, and that amazing scent stays on a good while.

effective for fine lines. i like these so much that i purchased more.this german skin care line is one of my favorites because of the quality of ingredients and the effectiveness of the product.no irritation, even around my sensitive eyes.the serum preps your skin for the next step of skin care, such as moisturizer. your day or night cream sinks into your skin better, creating a noticeable difference in fine lines.

stunning quick fix. this review is for the burgundy short version of this product, and for reference, my glove size is 7 1/2, or women's large.while it might not be the case for everyone, they included sizes that are a perfect fit. i did not use the smallest, nor the largest nail sizes.the burgundy color is gorgeous.the only filing needed is the very tip.set does not include the adhesive tabs, so remember to have enough on hand.

for your best friend...arf arf!. i've had a couple of versions of this style of detangling brush.do they work? yes!do they last? no!except for this one. it has outperformed the others.first, a bit about these brushes. they come in a number of shapes and paddles, but are similar in that they have the same kind of plastic bristles.the bristles stagger in length, and painlessly smooth knots and tangles.most of the time the bristles start to bend and then the brush is useless. after months of hard use, this one is still good as new.these are a favorite with parents of kids with unruly hair, because they don't hurt.i like it for myself, and it's also my 'secret weapon'.i have 2 maltese dogs, one is in full coat. that means long, flowing hair to the ground. most people with a malt in full coat need to section off the coat and roll up the hair, otherwise it gets so tangled it needs to be cut.this hairbrush is a silky coated dog's best friend. maltese, yorkies, afghans, havanese...they need this brush!

oily. easily wiped off, if you want it to last longer using a makeup setting spray. one of the pallets came broken on the side and they were really oily. but they did stand out in color well, if using multiple colors be patient and let dry so you don't run colors.

nice value. 10-year-old super mega-brand vs. sogue:1. the sogue operates 10k vbm (vibrations/minute) faster. that's why i choose the sogue.2. generic replacement brushes aren't interchangeable between the two. the sogue has a smaller shaft. the brushes are also smaller.3. the sogue comes with like a year's supply of brushes, unlike the super mega-brand. they are just a tad softer than i prefer. it took me some years to technically discriminate my preferred bristle adjective (soft, medium, hard) for re-order. my brush changing rule is 'new brush for every recharge' as brushes are now so inexpensive. the charges on these toothbrushes have got to be the longest-lasting rechargeable device in the house. it seems like months go by on a charge.4. the sogue and brush are about a quarter smaller. it's a noticeable difference. after a minute of thought, i think smaller is likely better as your teeth and the spaces in between are much smaller than you think. maybe it's getting in tighter corners.5. the sogue charges in like 2 hours vs. overnight for the super mega-brand.i was looking at the super mega-brand's newest models at the big-box store. the price is absurd given all the competition from suppliers like sogue. the latest super mega-brand models appear the same size as the sogue. at a third of the price and assuming the charge life is long, it's a no-brainer. i'll adapt. most of the difference between the two is a matter of personal preference.sogue wins for now. better than advertised.was my review helpful? if so, click "helpful" so i can know.

wonderfully bright blue. the rich blue pigment looks stunning for your eyelashes, and it can also be applied to the eyebrows. my only criticism of this is that the new style applicator brushes dont do as good a job as the longer bristled ones. i have no idea why so many companies have switched over to this design. also, the liquid is thin enough to be a little messy sometimes. once you get used to everything, the brilliant color looks great.

only had one set of 12 colors. im not sure what happened, but this is a photo of everything that was included with my kit. it only included one set of 12 colors, and without the others, this actually isnt very useful to me. i cant give this more than two stars when it doesnt have what it said it would. i hope they fixed this, which it appears they have from the other reviews. shame. it was otherwise fine.

smells like a freshly plucked rose. i love the scent of rose, and this face cream cleanser smells just like a freshly picked flower. absolutely lovely for removing your make up in a way that is moisturizing and leaves behind a beautiful scent.

unpleasant scent, dye lasts a while. i have been trying to have green hair for a while now, but inevitably in a few washes it fades to blue. i have tried several yellow dyes on top of the blue and this is the first one to stick around through a few washes. i washed my hair, towel dried it and then fairly thoroughly applied this dye throughout my hair. there is an unfortunate scent to it, i don't know how to describe it other than old pee. it goes away when your hair dries, but through the first two washes when your hair is wet you can smell it. i left the dye on overnight like i usually do and rinsed in the morning. i didn't see much of a conditioning or repairing effect, but it definitely got the green right. it is slowly rinsing out of my hair, but i am impressed with the brightness and longevity.

amazing skin!. my skin looks hydrated and feels soft. i double cleanse with an oil and a foaming cleanser. i used the ordinary exfoliating acid and then a toner. i put the eye cream on thick and put the sheet mask on top of it. i left it for 20 minutes and then took off the mask. i tapped in the extra serum until it was dry. i put the night pack on and went to bed. in the morning my skin felt so soft and was hydrated. it was a little much for my nose area, i got a very full whitehead the next day, but my nose is very oily. this is a nice treat once a week.

tight on your head. if you have a large head and plan on wearing this for a long period of time it might not be comfortable. i have a normal ish size head and it pressed my earrings into my head which wasn't comfortable, but i'll just take my earrings out next time. the side that sits on your forehead has a sticky strip to keep the cap from sliding and the side that goes on the base of your skull has a stretchy band to allow for sizing. the bow is cute and so is the pattern. i use these types of caps for incubating oil and deep conditioning masks. they are great for this, keeps the "juice" inside and the outside dry.

amazing for your face. i like to layer this on top of my moisturizer if my face feels particularly dry. this sinks in and goes to work keeping your face hydrated and not tight. there is sort of an odd scent to it, but it isn't overpowering. i have heard great things about prickly pear oils and this definitely lived up to my expectations.
1 star. smelled like vapor rub cream and burned and tingled my skin. i threw it away and wasn't able to use it at all.

5 stars. this lotion smells really good! i always use it in the spring and summer when it is warmer outside since it smells "beachy." it applies very smooth and helps to moisturize my dry skin. i love it.

very strong. i do my own dip nails so i need a strong acetone based product to remove the nails when i am ready to take them off. this did not disappoint. great product and a great price. i will use this again!

pros and cons. i really like this straightener for the most part. i'm not sure how... but my hair (and my daughters) seems to come from the wand so much shinier. it has an adjustable temperature setting, it does lock closed. it even comes with a bag to keep it in and a glove to wear while you are using it... which is where i have my problem. the way it opens leaves my hand too close to the heat which results in easily getting burned. which isn't a problem if you wear the glove... but being honest, i'm not going to use a heat shield glove every day to do my hair. i only use one of these **sometimes** when i am using a curling wand. so for me that is a huge con. it also comes with two hair clips to help separate the sections of your hair. for the price... its a great wand. you will get used to where you need to hold your hand.

too flimsy. these are great as regular headbands but not so good for strapping your mask to. the material is so so soft which is nice from a comfort standpoint but it isnt rigid enough to support the buttons on it so my mask straps just pull the buttons away from the material and fall off. i am going to try sewing the buttons through both sides of the fabric to see if that helps but its annoying that they arent working for their intended purpose.additionally, one of the buttons fell off almost immediately which again, doesnt help with the mask situation.

great moisturizer for most skin types. on my hunt for something to nourish my extra dry skin, i came across this moisturizer which seemed fairly promising. i love a more lightweight moisturizer that doesnt look greasy and this fits the bill. it absorbs completely and makes your skin feel hydrated and plump. i wear a lot of foundation and it goes over this moisturizer nicely without causing any weird texture or breakage. unfortunately with the cold weather now upon us, it still isnt quite enough to keep my skin hydrated all day and i do start to feel tight after a few hours. for me, this will be great in the warmer months but i just need a little bit more out of a cream in the winter. i think it is a great moisturizer for most people, just maybe not enough for those of us with desert dry skin.

this gave me a migraine more than once. this is an okay cleanser but it feels like im washing my face with lotion so my face doesnt feel clean at all. and there is too much of a good thing here regarding the scent, its nice but way too strong and the few times that i used this i actually got a migraine from it. i had to be sure it was because of the scent so i used it a few more times and yes its the scent, it gives me a big ole migraine. what on earth does that say about the health of this product. not good thats for sure.

amazing moisterizer. i have very dry skin and i love how it moisturizes. my skin is soft without feeling greasy. i just wished it had a stronger scent. i also bought the hippie peace and it has an amazing scent as well as wonderful moisturizing.
excellent product. mis hijas y mi esposa estn fascinadas con el producto, sencillo, econmico, fcil de usar y lo ms importante: te ahorra mucho dinero.

great lashes, poor liner. what i love about these magnetic lashes set is the lashes, you get 5 full sets of lashes that are all voluminous and look great on. the problem is the liner its, not the greatest, it's tacky and doesn't hold the lashes as well as other sets i have tried. i use the lashes with other liners and they work.

magnetic eyelashes. i am in love with this magnetic eyelashes kit. i have tried other brands before and really hated the eyeliner. this set has a precision eyeliner. it goes on so smooth and straight really love it and it makes the eyelashes to stick easily. i will say that you have to really apply a good amount of eyeliner all the way across the lid for the magnetic strips to work. it does take time and practice to really get the hang of these, but i find them so much easier than glue.

dont waste you money. everything about this product is false advertising. it is not waterproof at all, i could stand in front of the fan and it will come off. it only comes with one shape and is crazy long and unnatural. dont waste your money it is not worth it. im very disappointed
don't last long. while these pumice stones shave down dead skin and calluses nicely, they don't last long and break easily. the colored side is pretty much useless.

works great. this set works great. it makes it super easy to keep your beard neatly trimmed. it also works super well for cutting hair. you can even use it to cut designs into hair. it's really super useful. it's feels high quality and like it will last through a whole lot of uses.
great nail polish. love this polish because it stays on and does not quickly crack and peel. the only thing is i did not get to choose the colors, and some of the colors sent were not my taste.
dont work. this item i have been using it doesnt work at all

smooth. my hands and arms are bathed in this deep cream. my skin is so soft. the scent lasted until i showered. i have very sensitive skin, but this body butter is great for my entire body, even my face. so many people ask what i'm wearing - i say aging hippie :-) v

terrific results from a very unique design. i have been a huge fan of the relatively inexpensive, paperish, hugely saturated facial masks by companies like my beauty diary and others ( you can find my many positive reviews) until stumbling upon these lacey, saturated, fantastic masks.i really can't contribute more than other outstanding reviewers have elaborated on the technical advantages of these lacey versions compared to the paper ones except to say how wonderful it is to position the mask over your face and neck and then be able to gently secure it by pulling it over your ears. genious. the paper masks were good except the chin area never stays in place and i'm always checking to make sure the rest of it hasn't slid around on my face.these cost a little more but the results were so great after my first one, i immediately purchased 3 more boxes of this version and another one to try out.i am way past 50, but my skin looks terrific. smooth, soft, healthy and glowing. i could not be happier. go ahead and give these a try. but you better hurry before i buy them all up.
fit well. came with a cap to put over your real hair. looks exactly as advertised. it was purchased for halloween, wouldn't consider wearing it for anything other than that.
very pleased with this item. i love this kit. it has everything you can possibly need and then some. great quality for the price as well and the case isn't a cheapo like i thought it would be.

so far, so good.. i have sensitive skin. this has a smell to it (it's not a bad smell) so if you're sensitive to smells. it feels nice and moisturizing. it did burn a little but i think it's because i've been trying too many facial products! will update if it ends up being too bad or really good!

super refreshing. i love this product. it goes on thin and a little goes a long way. its not thick and goopy like other tanning lotions. it smells fantastic, and putting it on is refreshing. already had a base tan, and only tanned 2x with it so still unsure of the tanning benefits. but it still smells wonderful after tanning. if youre looking for a lotion that has light fragrance, this isnt for you. but for those of you who like fragrance, i wish i could find a perfume like this.

great. i have a cosmetology license but i am also frugal. purchased this to apply my own eyelash extensions and it worked great. i will be purchasing again.i do not recommend applying it to yourself though. it is difficult and you can damage your eyelashes if done incorrectly. the glue also burns your eyeballs.
perfect for me. love the color and the texture. it goes on smoothly. best i have found so far. am looking to purchase again in another color
great starter false eyelashes. never used false eyelashes before so i didn't want to spend a lot of money. i am loving these eye lashes. may use these for awhile before i upgrade
love em. best ones not the market. they are great! best ones i found so far
nice product. great device - just be careful using. this is really well made.
perfect size!!. this is about the third time i have ordered this type of rollers and each time they were too small until now. these are perfect!!!
works just as expected ... perfect for a weekend in vegas

great if you know what you are doing. i think these are a great idea. i need to practice more with it and adjust the size of the lashes. my initial attempts were a little messy and it is strange having the weight on your lids. i never could get the hang of the glue on lashes, so i was hoping these were easier. if you regularly use liquid liner, these will be easy for you to use. the hardest part is getting the liner on smooth and straight. once it is on, the lashes stick very well to the magnetic bits in the liner. also, they come off fairly easily when pulled. potentially, it means you could accidentally pull them off if you play with your lashes or rub your eyes. but they do stay on well, without touching.the lashes are a standard length, so if your eyes are smaller or larger than standard, you may have to adjust - more for smaller than larger. if you've never worn lashes but have always wanted to try, this is a good way to start.

not as pictured. the wig is nice and soft. i bought it for a costume party, so i didn't need it to be totally realistic, which is lucky for me since the wig has big, white stripes right in the front. it looks like a tiger. since it was for a gold-themed costume party, i was able to put gold eyeshadow in the white stripes and spray the wig with gold glitter to "fix" it.

more of a makeup remover than a cleanser. this product comes in a glass bottle with a pump dispenser. the dispenser has a very small spout, making it difficult to dispense the product without having it run down the side of the bottle. note that there is oil in the name - it feels like an oil and goes on like an oil, with no foaming or cleansing at all. it also has a strong scent of lavender (which i like, but others may not).this product works well as a remover for eye makeup. however, i don't feel that it does a good job of cleansing my face overall. although the product rinses clean and leaves my face feeling soft, my face doesn't feel clean, and i feel the need to use an actual cleanser after. i would recommend this product as a eye makeup remover only and would suggest that "cleanser" be removed from the name.

yes, these really work...but keep a few things in mind. after very minimal and barely noticeable success with whitening toothpastes and gels, i finally decided to give crest premium whitestrips a try. previously, i had found the cost to be prohibitive, but the fact that $5 or $7 coupons are offered in our sunday paper with some regularity made the price a bit easier to swallow.just like the commercials say, i definitely did begin to see some improvement after about three days. i would describe the effect as more of a lightening than a whitening per se: the darker yellow spots on my teeth began to fade and to become less apparent. now, after using the product as prescribed for a week, the color of my teeth is clearly improved; i wouldn't say that my teeth are bright white, but they are definitely more of an ivory or a paler yellow color. according to the package insert, you can immediately begin a second course of treatment for even better whitening effects, but i haven't yet decided if i want to lay out another $30 in order to do this. also, i should mention that the effect is not so dramatic thta anyone has noticed (unlike in the commercials!).now for the caveats. first of all, i found these strips to be a bit difficult to use. it can be hard to remove the strips from the protective backing without them becoming mangled, and it is very easy to get the gel on your fingertips (which causes a temporary whitening effect). also, the strips are not ideally shaped for your mouth, and i found that they covered my front eight teeth only. finally, while the top strip adhered fairly well, i found that the bottom strip was more tricky and tended to slide around, especially if i moved my mouth at all. the only solution i found to this was to wear the strips while commuting to work, which luckily gave me a 30-minute period when i did not need to talk. otherwise, it can be difficult to find a good time to wear the strips, as the insert information advises against wearing them immediately after you brush your teeth, while sleeping, and while you are eating/drinking.unlike other reviewers, i did not have a problem with the taste of the strips: i could not detect anything while wearing them, and after taking them off, i thought that the gooey paste left behind was virtually tasteless. i did experience some sensitivity in a lower tooth which i had capped over 20 years ago. although this sensation went away in time, it was uncomforable enough to make me cut the lower strip to fit around this particular tooth.in summary, i did see clear--although not miraculous--results from this product and i would be willing to try the strips again, especially if the price were to come down a bit. ultimately, i would rate crest whitestrips three and a half stars, as there is definitely room for improvement.

too thin for me.... update: waaaay too thin!!! wouldn't repurchase. break easily.whatever, they're rubber bands... thinner than i like... but they're okay. wouldn't buy again just as i prefer much thicker nylon stocking type band - less hair crimping but good hold. i'm going to stick with those from now on, but it's personal preference. a decent product.

good product, deluxe travel size. i love moroccanoil products. i have their full size color care conditioner but this one i ordered is the deluxe travel size - tsa friendly and easy to pack for travel, but the amount is not a lot and you will use this up easily if you wash your hair frequently. the price is high for the amount so it's not a great value - i would just purchase the large size and transfer some to an empty 3 or 4 oz bottle so you can get it through airport security.

another product for the landfill. this is more like a gimmick than a functional "nail dust" vacuum. i was hoping i could use this mini vacuum for cleaning up crumbs as well. it runs on batteries but the suction level is average and i have to go over the space with the vacuum several times before it picks up anything. the idea is good only if it has strong power but you can tell it's cheaply made. another item for the landfill, thanks aoerm (yet another meaningless and unpronounceable brand name from the land of junk)

very nice set but gua sha came broken. i love the graphics on the outside box - most gua sha and rose quartz roller sets come in plain, generic packaging and this one is pretty enough to gift. unfortunately, when i opened my box i was stunned to find that the gua sha stone was cracked in half, even though it was nestled in the box! either this happened at the factory and the stone was still sent to me damaged, or it happened during shipping. however, most sets i've received that are presented in the same manner arrive in perfect condition. not sure what happened but i'm disappointed, as i could tell it was a really nice stone.

average body wash. this has a strong scent of mango, which is quite appealing. outside of that, the body wash doesn't lather that well and the consistency of the wash is on the thin side. it's cleans well but other than the mango scent i wasn't impressed by it. the price isn't too high though it's a rather small bottle. overall it's ok but i don't love it enough to order it again.

refreshing soap for your face as well as your body. this black soap bar feels as thick as a brick but feels great on my skin. it's made with activated charcoal and has the coloring of charcoal, but thankfully not the scent! under a hot shower it releases a nice minty scent and the hardy soap appears to less vulnerable to melting away in the soap dish unlike other softer soaps i've used. it's made for men but i don't see why women can't use it as well, as it's refreshing. it's best used for the face, as it cleans out your pores, but as i wash my face and body in the shower at the same time, it's a perfect face body combination soap.

works as well as any other type of cotton ear swabs. my swabs came in a small box and looked less than 200, but it may be just the way the swabs were packed - very tightly and with no outer wrapping. they feel sturdier than the swabs that have plastic handles - i use these to clean my ears but also to dab listerine along my gumline to help fight gingivitis. it feels solidly made and the swabs are tightly wound rather than soft and flabby like cheaper swabs. overall i'm happy with these.

great as a styling wax - hold is not as strong. i think it works better as a styling wax - it didn't stiffen my hair as much as i would have liked, but the cream made it a breeze to style. the scent is a little strong but it's pleasant. i think this product could be used by both men and women though it's obviously intended for men. this product is made in england and the graphics are pleasant to look at it - it has a quaint victorian vibe about it. overall i'm pleased with the product but the price could be better

soft and flexible to wear. this headband is soft and flexible. it keeps my hair from falling into my eyes when i do my morning routine of washing my face. it's also great for holding your hair back after you shampoo and making it easier to style. it can also be washed after every use and dries quickly because the material isn't too thick. overall it's of a good quality.

attractive set of portable perfume atomizers. this is a multi-colored set of travel perfume atomizers. each one is shaped like a fancy pen or lip gloss, which makes it easy to mistake it for one. however, each one is quite attractive and adds a touch of glamour to your purse. each slender tube holds quite a bit of perfume. this is ideal for travel and would make a nice gift for the frequent traveler who can't live without her favorite perfumes.

strongly scented body wash - wakes up your senses. this is a strongly scented mens body wash with notes of ginseng, green tea, menthol and vitamin b. caffeine is also listed as an ingredient. the menthol and the ginseng scents overpower the rest. it lathers up very well and imparts a cooling sensation that makes you tingle all over and even clears your sinuses! i would recommend this body wash for people with colds because this really helps. i love it.

reasonably effective flat iron. this flat iron is versatile in that it's effective on dry hair as well as wet - usually i avoid straightening my hair when it's dry out of fear that it will damage my hair. in this case i didn't notice any ill after effects - the tourmaline ceramic plates are designed to be softly reactive to your hair, so this may be the reason. the best advice i can give is to be aware of the heat settings - i typically use the lowest and work my way up depending on how my hair reacts.like most flat irons by parwin, it heats up fast and has a swivel cord. given how many flat irons there are on the market, i would say this is ok in terms of what it does for the price. i wouldn't say it was exceptional but i like the versatility of the dry hair option.

small hair trimmer with low noise level. this hair trimmer comes with two attachments, a usb charging cord and even a cute little cape with the company's logo for your child to wear while you trim his/her hair. it's small and portable, so you can even take it on a trip. the best thing is that it isn't too noisy so it won't scare your little one. a courtesy card from the company thanking you for purchasing the product even includes a quote about how great mothers are from singer stevie wonder!overall this is a very useful product that will save a parent money from taking your little one to the barber shop or hair salon. it works well and i can't see why it can't be used for an adult's hair as well, though the small size made it clear that is meant for a child's small head.

lightens your face but kind of overpriced for what you get. this is a small bottle of powder that comes with a tiny spoon. you dab a bit of the white powder into your hand and mix it with your regular moisturizer, which you then apply to your face. i used a little water and my usual aveeno moisturizer with spf 15 sunblock. my face does look a little brighter after using it for a week but the effect is somewhat similar to using a light-colored makeup foundation. unfortunately it has little effect on my crow's-feet or my small "laugh lines". it's ok but since i can get the same effect applying certain types of makeup or concealers, it's chief benefit is that it's good to use when you don't want to wear makeup and want something that has a lighter feel on your face. otherwise, the price is kind of high for what you get.

thorough clean without stripping hair, container needs to be modified. this does what it is supposed to do without drying out your hair and leaving it feeling stripped. the only drawback is the tube it comes in -you have to be patient and apply lots of pressure to tube to get the shampoo to come out.
three stars. works as expected just to small for our application

actually works when used properly- ask for a link to my video review. things i learned:-do not over massage-use the cream properly-use the massager properly-use the cream right after. these products come in a pair for a reason.alright, i'll get to the point. does the product do what it says?in so many words, yes, most definitely.my experience with the products was as follows.first, i mistakenly used the cream on my legs during my shower as a way of lubricating the massager.tip: this is incorrect... i know that now.luckily, i din't waste much and my experience with the brush was actually really great. massaging is painless and since its manual, you get to choose the level of pressure you feel you ought to apply.one caveat--do not over rub. i did so and ended up bursting my bum, waking up the following morning with bits of--what i assume was--busted blood cells. i even bruised a bit. long story short, go easy on yourself and do not massage too often. i would suggest about four times a week as a maximum.the cream itself is nice. i've used it about 5 times now, and i can already so a minor difference. although i generally attribute this to the massager, the cream does leave the skin feeling tighter for sure. it does remain sticky for a couple of seconds (about 45...less than a minute, not bad) but drys completely.my experience has taught me that, by using the correct products correctly, you can actually get rid of cellulite.last and final point; i'm not sure how permanent this is, however, massaging and creaming really isn't that much of a hassle. any hey, if it keeps the cellulite off...disclaimer: free for review.

leaks when upside down. these bottles are well packaged.my dropper doesnt screw on my bottle like i expected it to.the bottles leak a little when tipped.the sprayer works great and gives an even spray across the surface.i added a silicone bottle boot to the bottom of my sprayers so that i could easily identify them and also it helps to prevent me from cracking it when i accidentally hit the edge of my counter with the bottle.
hydrating face mask but.... not what was expected. returned.
wonder cream. i used this after laser resurfacing and wow.... fantastic.

... a makeup junkie and i can tell you the worst thing about wearing makeup is cleaning the brushes. i am a makeup junkie and i can tell you the worst thing about wearing makeup is cleaning the brushes. usually when i clean my brushes i clean them all at one time creating a huge mess and taking up my whole counter area as they are laying out to dry. this brush holder works like a charm and is very compact. it is very easy to assemble just connect the legs and its good to go. this hold 28 brushes so it works great for me. as i can fill it in no time. there are different slots for different brushes. it holds the brushes well and in place and i think because of them being upside down makes them dry faster and help hold their shape. love this new tool and now i dont dread cleaning my brushes any longer.i received this brush holder for free for testing and reviewing purposes. this is my honest unbiased opinion and have come to it by using the holder myself.

arrived ahead of time which was super cool! i was incredibly excited to try this .... arrived ahead of time which was super cool! i was incredibly excited to try this product out after seeing the buzzfeed video with them using it.when i first opened the package, i was a bit shocked at how big of a bottle it was but how it seemed like barely half was full. when attempting to squeeze is out it was very much like trying to get the last of a product out of a container just as you're about to run out of it. all air, very little inside.i did a small test area just to see if there was any kind of crazy reaction and i didn't have any issues. goes on, peels off, wash away any little flakes that don't peel with it. however, when i went back to do a full mask i noticed that even though i had totally sealed it up tight, within about 20 minutes a massive amount of the product had leaked into the lid. i cleaned it up so it didn't solidify and placed the bottle upside down, so the lid was facing up instead.the full mask itself went on nice and easy, just like the test. when i peeled it off, i did notice my skin felt fresher but it didn't really pull anything out. i checked the peeled off mask itself and while it had plenty of little itty bitty hairs from my face, nothing really noticeable. i checked out problem areas in the mirror and they looked basically the same, maybe with some blackheads and things closer to the surface and drawn up so they could be removed. the effect was minimal though and pretty disappointing.i'll finish it off since there isn't much left and there is no point in not using it, but i won't be buying any more after this.
obsessed. i am absolutely obsessed with this makeup bag. it keeps everything organized and easy to find. it is sturdy and durable as well as easy to clean.
five stars. not sure how i ever quilted without these! no more safety pins or straight pins!!!

50/50 chance you get a good bottle. doesn't matter where you buy them, who you buy from, etc. there is a 50% chance you get a good bottle of polish and a 50% chance you get a bad one. i have 3 bottles from 3 different places, 3 different colors (blue white and black) and the blue one is good, the white one is meh, and the black one is completely useless. the white and black have bent brushes, and the white polish is a bit dried out but not the worst, kind of reminds me of using white-out before they changed the formula and it got all watery and they changed to a sponge applicator from a brush. the black one is awful - it's literally just clumps of dried out polish with some occasional damp spots. the blue one is okay, the polish is alright, but i wouldn't recommend using the brushes that came with these but buying a separate skinny brush for line work or whatever it is you want to do.i should mention i have been using them to fix an enameled piece of jewelry as opposed to doing nails, as that's what the jeweler recommended (nobody local repairs enamel resin and buying enamel is very expensive and you end up with a ton leftover), so a jeweler i trust recommended nail polish with a good resin sealant and that's what i've been doing. initially i had used an x-acto knife to cut painter's tape around the shapes of different colors and metal but switched to this pink-colored liquid latex paint i saw on a youtube video for nail designs and it's much easier.
its ok ...... not real jade . super porous so every time i used it after cleaning it id break out .
good price. i like to use these with a cleanser on my face and they are very nice. i feel like they are a little scrubby without being abrasive. and this price is cheaper than walmart.

not what i expected. arrived damaged. the package had been torn open and taped shut (see pictures). also, the lavender variety is not filled as much as the other two (again see pictures). either the lavender weighs less than the advertised 14oz, or the other two weigh more. or, it was used and returned and then the remaining product was poured into a new bag and resealed. pretty disappointed with this purchase. bought this as a christmas gift for my mom, it arrived on christmas eve so no time to return it (not complaining about arrival date; i knew it would arrive today). i will keep the lavender for myself since it obviously has less product than the other two.
great toothbrush. i see the dentist every six months, and get a excellent check up each time, i guess it is working like a charm.

my cats love this. my cats have never liked any kind of brushing, but as they get older they're having a hard time grooming themselves and so i decided to try this. they both love it! it gently pulls out loose hair without tugging on their skin and they just lay there and purr and purr while i brush them. it's also really easy to clean.

work well, beautiful,. great brushes for the price! the handles are a little less comfortable than some brushes, so i won't reach for these every single day, but i usually use 3 or 4 eye brushes a look so i have been working these farah brushes in.

not as it appears. i thought the polish would come out like the metallic finish of the bottle but it does not. its more of a sparkly gray. i dont recommend this product if youre looking for a real mirror finish.

not overpriced, feels great, all natural. it's creamy, price is fair,all natural ingredients. even my man will let me put it on his rough .hands. i liked getting 3 bottles..one for bedroom,one for bath,and one for my daughter. sweet!

great little bag, great price!. i think anyone who follows me or knows me understands my needs for bags. i love them all. big small, cosmetic, totes, ect. i seem always need one for something but this one is for my makeup for a change.i have used my others for projects or other crafting items so i needed this.
